title: selaginella meridensis
intro: Selaginella meridensis, also known as "Mayo yerba" or "Selaginella," is a species of spore-producing plant native to the tropical regions of South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic activities, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Selaginella meridensis include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as treating respiratory and urinary tract infections. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea or infused in oil to harness its medicinal properties, and it is also used in traditional medicine in some parts of South America.
